kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"(_index:metrics-system.network-default AND (system.network.name:(enp* OR ens* OR wlp* OR eth0 OR eth1) AND NOT system.network.name:lo)) OR (_index:metrics-system.diskio-default AND system.diskio.name:(nvme* OR sd* OR vd*))","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"index":"system-metrics-diagnostics"}

attributes.title: Derivative Oscillation Diagnostics
attributes.description:
Diagnostic view to investigate derivative oscillation issues. Shows raw counter values by host/interface to identify:
1. Counter resets (sudden decreases)
2. Missing data points (gaps in time series)
3. Multiple hosts/interfaces causing aggregation issues
4. Negative derivatives from counter wraparound

Key things to check:
- Are counter values monotonically increasing? (should be yes)
- Do counters reset or decrease? (indicates counter wraparound or host restart)
- Are there gaps in the time series? (missing data points)
- Are multiple hosts/interfaces being aggregated? (check host.name and interface names)
